title: astragalus amphioxys
intro: Astragalus amphioxys is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family, commonly referred to as the "chinese milkvetch." It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus amphioxys include enhancing the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus amphioxys is often prepared as a herbal supplement, available in capsule or powder form, and can also be consumed as a tea.
